  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c-transparency", "name": "Transparency in information products", "aliases": ["transparency"], "description": "Providing sufficient visibility into information products so that estimates and results can be understood and reproduced.", "grounding_span": "transparency and reproducibility in information products released by the Census Bureau", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c-reproducibility", "name": "Reproducibility", "aliases": ["reproduce"], "description": "The ability of qualified users to reproduce the estimates and results in an information product.", "grounding_span": "qualified users can reproduce the estimates and results in the products", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c-documentation", "name": "Documentation", "aliases": ["methodological documentation"], "description": "Material that must be readily accessible to the public to support transparency and reproducibility.", "grounding_span": "specify the documentation that must be readily accessible to the public", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c-readily-accessible", "name": "Readily accessible", "aliases": [], "description": "Documentation available in sufficient detail for qualified users to understand, analyze, reproduce, and evaluate results.", "grounding_span": "Documentation must be readily accessible in sufficient detail", "location": "Requirement F2-2"},
    {"id": "c-information-product", "name": "Information product", "aliases": [], "description": "A product released by the Census Bureau to the public, sponsors, joint partners, or other customers.", "grounding_span": "all information products released by the Census Bureau", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "c-confidentiality", "name": "Confidentiality", "aliases": [], "description": "Legal and policy requirement to safeguard protected or administratively restricted information.", "grounding_span": "safeguarding the confidentiality of protected information or administratively restricted information", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c-protected-info", "name": "Protected information", "aliases": [], "description": "Information whose confidentiality is protected by federal law and Census Bureau policy.", "grounding_span": "breach the confidentiality of protected information", "location": "Requirement F2-1"},
    {"id": "c-admin-restricted", "name": "Administratively restricted information", "aliases": [], "description": "Information subject to administrative restrictions on release.", "grounding_span": "administratively restricted information", "location": "Requirement F2-1"},
    {"id": "c-data-use-agreements", "name": "Data-use agreements", "aliases": [], "description": "Agreements with other agencies that may restrict what documentation can be released.", "grounding_span": "violate data-use agreements with other agencies", "location": "Requirement F2-1"},
    {"id": "c-qualified-user", "name": "Qualified user", "aliases": [], "description": "A user able to understand, analyze, reproduce, and evaluate results given adequate documentation.", "grounding_span": "allow qualified users to understand and analyze the information", "location": "Requirement F2-2"},
    {"id": "c-data-program", "name": "Data program", "aliases": [], "description": "The survey, census, evaluation study, or research program that produces the data.", "grounding_span": "Descriptions of the data program must be readily accessible.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.1"},
    {"id": "c-target-population", "name": "Universe of inference / target population", "aliases": [], "description": "The population the program is designed to make inferences about.", "grounding_span": "The universe of inference or target population for the program.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.1"},
    {"id": "c-concepts-variables", "name": "Concepts, variables, and classifications", "aliases": [], "description": "The underlying concepts, variables, and classifications that structure the data.", "grounding_span": "Descriptions of the concepts, variables, and classifications that underlie the data must be readily accessible.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.2"},
    {"id": "c-key-variables", "name": "Key variables", "aliases": [], "description": "The variables identified as central to the data.", "grounding_span": "Identification of the key variables.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.2"},
    {"id": "c-derived-measures", "name": "Derived measures", "aliases": [], "description": "Measures computed from underlying variables.", "grounding_span": "Descriptions of any derived measures.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.2"},
    {"id": "c-methodology", "name": "Methodology", "aliases": [], "description": "The methods used to collect and process the data and to produce estimates.", "grounding_span": "Descriptions of the methodology, including the methods used to collect and process the data and to produce estimates, must be readily accessible.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-data-quality", "name": "Data quality", "aliases": [], "description": "The fitness of data as ensured through methodological practices.", "grounding_span": "Discussion of methods employed to ensure data quality.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-quality-profiles", "name": "Quality profiles", "aliases": [], "description": "Documentation summarizing quality characteristics of a program.", "grounding_span": "Quality profiles.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-source-accuracy", "name": "Source and accuracy statement", "aliases": [], "description": "A statement describing data sources and accuracy.", "grounding_span": "Source and accuracy statement.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-sampling-frame", "name": "Sampling frame", "aliases": [], "description": "The list or mechanism from which the sample is drawn.", "grounding_span": "Description of the sampling frame.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-sample-design", "name": "Sample design", "aliases": [], "description": "The design governing how the sample is selected.", "grounding_span": "Description of the sample design.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-sample-weights", "name": "Sample weights", "aliases": [], "description": "Weights, including nonresponse adjustments, applied to sample cases.", "grounding_span": "Description of sample weights, including adjustments for nonresponse.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-estimation-procedures", "name": "Estimation procedures", "aliases": ["weighting, editing, and imputation"], "description": "Procedures for producing estimates including weighting, editing, and imputation.", "grounding_span": "Description of estimation procedures, including weighting, editing, and imputation methods.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-imputation", "name": "Imputation for item nonresponse", "aliases": [], "description": "Filling in missing item values; reasons must be given when not carried out.", "grounding_span": "Reasons for not imputing the data when imputation for item nonresponse is not carried out.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-variance-estimates", "name": "Variance estimation", "aliases": [], "description": "How to calculate variance estimates for the data.", "grounding_span": "Description of how to calculate variance estimates.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-nonsampling-error", "name": "Nonsampling error", "aliases": [], "description": "Errors from nonresponse, coverage, processing, and measurement.", "grounding_span": "Discussion of potential nonsampling errors (e.g., nonresponse, coverage, processing, and measurement).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-seasonal-adjustment", "name": "Seasonal adjustment methods", "aliases": [], "description": "Methods used to seasonally adjust estimates.", "grounding_span": "Description of seasonal adjustment methods.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-small-area-estimation", "name": "Small area estimation methods", "aliases": [], "description": "Methods for producing estimates for small areas.", "grounding_span": "Description of small area estimation methods.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3"},
    {"id": "c-quality-measures", "name": "Measures and indicators of data quality", "aliases": [], "description": "Quantitative indicators of the quality of the data that must be readily accessible.", "grounding_span": "Measures and indicators of the quality of the data must be readily accessible.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.1"},
    {"id": "c-response-rates", "name": "Response rates", "aliases": ["unit response rates", "item response rates"], "description": "Unit and item response, allocation, and quantity response rates.", "grounding_span": "Unit response rates or quantity response rates.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.1"},
    {"id": "c-coverage", "name": "Coverage", "aliases": ["coverage ratios"], "description": "How well the target population is covered by the data or records.", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.1"},
    {"id": "c-precision", "name": "Statistical precision indicators", "aliases": ["sampling variance", "standard errors", "coefficients of variation", "confidence intervals"], "description": "Indicators of the statistical precision of the estimates.", "grounding_span": "Indicators of the statistical precision of the estimates (e.g., estimates of sampling variances, standard errors, coefficients of variation, or confidence intervals).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.1"},
    {"id": "c-record-linkage", "name": "Record linkage", "aliases": ["nonmatches"], "description": "Linking data sets and the loss or effects due to nonmatches.", "grounding_span": "The proportion of records lost from the analysis or estimate due to nonmatches when linking data sets.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.1"},
    {"id": "c-model-diagnostics", "name": "Model diagnostics", "aliases": [], "description": "Diagnostics such as goodness of fit and coefficient of variation.", "grounding_span": "Model diagnostics (e.g., goodness of fit, coefficient of variation, and percent reduction in confidence interval of the direct estimates).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.1"},
    {"id": "c-nonresponse-bias", "name": "Nonresponse bias analysis", "aliases": [], "description": "Analyses of bias arising from nonresponse.", "grounding_span": "Nonresponse bias analyses.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.2"},
    {"id": "c-evaluation-studies", "name": "Evaluation studies", "aliases": [], "description": "Studies of response error, interviewer variance, respondent debriefing, record check, and mode effects.", "grounding_span": "Evaluation studies (e.g., evaluation studies of response error, interviewer variance, respondent debriefing, record check or validation, and mode effects).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.2"},
    {"id": "c-public-use-files", "name": "Public-use data files", "aliases": [], "description": "Released data files documented so qualified users can understand and work with them.", "grounding_span": "Documentation of public-use data files must be readily accessible in sufficient detail to allow a qualified user to understand and work with the files.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.4"},
    {"id": "c-data-dictionary", "name": "Data dictionary / record layout", "aliases": [], "description": "Variable names and descriptions documenting a public-use file.", "grounding_span": "Variable names and descriptions (e.g., data dictionary or record layout).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.4"},
    {"id": "c-missing-flags", "name": "Missing and imputed item flags", "aliases": [], "description": "Flags indicating which items are missing or imputed.", "grounding_span": "Description of flags to indicate missing and imputed items.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.4"}
  ],
  "definitions": [],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl-purpose", "claim_text": "The purpose of this standard is to specify the documentation that must be readily accessible to the public to ensure transparency and reproducibility in information products released by the Census Bureau.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The purpose of this standard is to specify the documentation that must be readily accessible to the public to ensure transparency and reproducibility in information products released by the Census Bureau.", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "cl-not-always-possible", "claim_text": "Because federal law and Census Bureau policies require safeguarding confidentiality, complete transparency and reproducibility may not always be possible.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "complete transparency and reproducibility may not always be possible", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "cl-at-minimum", "claim_text": "At a minimum, the documentation will allow users to assess the accuracy and reliability of the estimates and results in the Census Bureau’s information products.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "At a minimum, the documentation will allow users to assess the accuracy and reliability of the estimates and results in the Census Bureau’s information products.", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "cl-f2-1", "claim_text": "Documentation that would breach the confidentiality of protected or administratively restricted information, or violate data-use agreements with other agencies, must not be released.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Documentation that would breach the confidentiality of protected information or administratively restricted information or that would violate data-use agreements with other agencies must not be released.", "location": "Requirement F2-1"},
    {"id": "cl-f2-2", "claim_text": "Documentation must be readily accessible in sufficient detail to allow qualified users to understand and analyze the information and to reproduce and evaluate the results.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Documentation must be readily accessible in sufficient detail to allow qualified users to understand and analyze the information and to reproduce (within the constraints of confidentiality requirements) and evaluate the results.", "location": "Requirement F2-2"},
    {"id": "cl-scope", "claim_text": "The Census Bureau’s statistical quality standards apply to all information products released by the Census Bureau and the activities that generate those products.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The Census Bureau’s statistical quality standards apply to all information products released by the Census Bureau and the activities that generate those products", "location": "Scope"},
    {"id": "cl-compliance", "claim_text": "All Census Bureau employees and Special Sworn Status individuals must comply with these standards, including contractors and others receiving Census Bureau funding.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "All Census Bureau employees and Special Sworn Status individuals must comply with these standards", "location": "Scope"}
  ],
  "instruments": [],
  "measures": [],

    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "c-evaluation-studies", "grounding_span": "Evaluation studies (e.g., evaluation studies of response error, interviewer variance, respondent debriefing, record check or validation, and mode effects).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.3.2"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "c-public-use-files", "grounding_span": "Documentation of public-use data files must be readily accessible in sufficient detail to allow a qualified user to understand and work with the files.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.4"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "c-data-dictionary", "grounding_span": "Variable names and descriptions (e.g., data dictionary or record layout).", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.4"},
    {"type": "mentions", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "c-missing-flags", "grounding_span": "Description of flags to indicate missing and imputed items.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F2-2.4"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-purpose", "grounding_span": "The purpose of this standard is to specify the documentation that must be readily accessible to the public to ensure transparency and reproducibility in information products released by the Census Bureau.", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-not-always-possible", "grounding_span": "complete transparency and reproducibility may not always be possible", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-at-minimum", "grounding_span": "At a minimum, the documentation will allow users to assess the accuracy and reliability of the estimates and results in the Census Bureau’s information products.", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-f2-1", "grounding_span": "Documentation that would breach the confidentiality of protected information or administratively restricted information or that would violate data-use agreements with other agencies must not be released.", "location": "Requirement F2-1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-f2-2", "grounding_span": "Documentation must be readily accessible in sufficient detail to allow qualified users to understand and analyze the information and to reproduce (within the constraints of confidentiality requirements) and evaluate the results.", "location": "Requirement F2-2"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-scope", "grounding_span": "The Census Bureau’s statistical quality standards apply to all information products released by the Census Bureau and the activities that generate those products", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f2-prov", "to_id": "cl-compliance", "grounding_span": "All Census Bureau employees and Special Sworn Status individuals must comply with these standards", "location": "Scope"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl-purpose", "to_id": "c-transparency", "grounding_span": "to ensure transparency and reproducibility in information products", "location": "Purpose"},

  "proposed_relationships": [
    {"grounding_span": "The documentation required by this standard aims to provide sufficient transparency into the Census Bureau’s information products so that qualified users can reproduce the estimates and results in the products.", "suggested_edge": "supports", "note": "Documentation supports/enables transparency and reproducibility — a purpose/enablement relation not expressible with allowed edge types.", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"grounding_span": "Documentation must be readily accessible in sufficient detail to allow qualified users to understand and analyze the information and to reproduce (within the constraints of confidentiality requirements) and evaluate the results. The documentation must be made readily accessible by doing one or more of the following:", "suggested_edge": "has_sub_requirement", "note": "Requirement F2-2 decomposes into Sub-Requirements F2-2.1 through F2-2.4; the schema has no requirement/sub-requirement part-whole edge.", "location": "Requirement F2-2"},
    {"grounding_span": "The Census Bureau Geospatial Product Metadata Standard (GPMS), and the [Federal Geographic Data Committee (FGDC) Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata (CSDGM)](https://www.fgdc.gov/standards/projects/FGDC-standards-projects/metadata/base-metadata/v2_0698.pdf) provide additional requirements for geospatial products.", "suggested_edge": "supplemented_by", "note": "F2 is supplemented by GPMS and FGDC CSDGM for geospatial products — an additive-requirement relation between standards distinct from builds_on/extends.", "location": "Requirement F2-2"}
  ]
}
